summary: Completed frontend-only E2E testing of the Charlotte LLC multi-page site against the external preview URL. All 9 requested feature flows verified successfully: home hero + ticker + ExploreHub (4 hub links), client-side routing to /brands /founders /operations /about, three brand cards with external Visit links, two founder cards with real customer-assets images that loaded (naturalWidth 752 and 1080), three live clocks updating every second (Louisville/Nicosia/Strasbourg), About page references to FLYX and Kentucky, EN/FR toggle changing nav labels and persisting across navigation, mobile hamburger opening menu with 4 links, and footer with brand external + internal page links.
critical_code_review_comments: No issues found — site is a clean static React Router SPA with proper data-testid coverage on all interactive/critical elements (nav links, lang toggles, mobile menu, hub links, brand cards, founder cards, ops clocks, footer links).

Minor observation: networkidle never settles on this app (continuous ticker/animation requestAnimationFrame). Future testing agents should use `domcontentloaded` + explicit waits instead of networkidle.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None — static frontend, no backend APIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses React Router (BrowserRouter). All testids confirmed: nav-{brands,founders,operations,about}-link, lang-toggle-{en,fr}, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, mobile-nav-*-link, explore-hub, hub-link-/{path}, brand-card-{telecom,spy,snow}, founder-card-0/1, ops-clock-0/1/2, footer-page-/{path}. Founder images served from customer-assets.emergentagent.com and load with naturalWidth>0. Use wait_until='domcontentloaded' (NOT networkidle).

i18n.FR_heading_sample: Enregistrée au Kentucky. Opérant dans le monde entier, hors EMEA.
